notes: I also noticed the issues mentioned here previously with the mouse cursor not leaving the borders of the game screen, and windowed mode being visually offset if you switch to it until you restart. For me the mouse cursor limitation was not a concern, and the game seemed to work fine in fullscreen mode without any need for modifications.
title: 4 Elements

notes:
If you switch the game from fullscreen to windowed mode, the screen will be shifted,but that fixes itself after restarting the game.  
Other than that, runs perfectly.
title: 4 Elements
